title: chlorocyperus prolixus
intro: Chlorocyperus prolixus, also known as the long-tailed sedge, is a plant species belonging to the sedge family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various folk medicine systems for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Chlorocyperus prolixus include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce swelling and ease pain. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and crushing the leaves or roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or poultices for therapeutic use.
